extraction.one_line_summary: PÖLLBURGGER Lukas attacked from the early break inside final 1km, denying sprinters through late positioning compression that caused peloton backup.
tactical_patterns: Peloton compression/backup in final kilometers allowed breakaway riders to stay clear despite late catch attempts.
Benedetti prioritized KOM jersey points over stage win, revealing GC teams letting break gather jersey bonuses.
Multiple riders unclipped during peloton backup showing positioning chaos neutralized sprint train organization completely.

rider_signals.PÖLLBURGGER Lukas: positive: Austrian showed unexpected TTT-level endurance staying clear from early break despite multiple KOM contests draining breakaway
rider_signals.BENEDETTI Cesare: neutral: Tactical KOM point collection suggests pre-stage team directive to secure jersey over stage result
rider_signals.HÄMOT Tea: positive: Strong late-break sprinting suggests misplaced in breakaway role, could contest reduced bunch sprints
